description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, angular floor plan. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto several blue-tinted balcony or patio areas. The house features multiple outdoor living spaces, including a garden terrace with greenery and seating, as well as smaller balconies with furniture. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others more modest in size, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a glass door and a sheltered overhang, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on open, interconnected indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large glass windows, and multiple blue-accented balconies and terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a glass door, large windows, and a prominent blue balcony area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a garden terrace with greenery, seating, and additional large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple balconies, a large garage door, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring smaller balconies, more windows, and a clear view of the house's angular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with a sheltered overhang, minimal steps, and clean, modern lines.
